attributes.description: Alerts when peak concurrent executions approach capacity limits, predicting imminent throttling.
attributes.name: [AWS Lambda OTel] High concurrent executions

investigation_guide.blob:
## High Concurrent Executions

### Triage Steps
1. Compare peak concurrency with your account regional limit and any per-function reserved concurrency.
2. Review `UnreservedConcurrentExecutions` for remaining shared-pool headroom.
3. Check for traffic spikes or slow invocations holding concurrency slots.
4. Evaluate provisioned or reserved concurrency before throttling occurs.
5. Cross-check the throttling alert rules — saturation often precedes throttles.

### Note
The default threshold assumes a 1000 regional concurrency limit. Adjust to your account limit and reserved concurrency settings.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/Lambda"
    AND MetricName == "ConcurrentExecutions"
    AND stat == "Maximum"
| STATS peak_concurrency = MAX(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/ConcurrentExecutions`)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
// Concurrency threshold: set near your account/function limit (default regional limit is 1000)
| WHERE peak_concurrency > 800
| EVAL function_id = CONCAT(FunctionName, "/", cloud.region)
| SORT peak_concurrency DESC
| LIMIT 10
